page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmc7.32xlarge is a bare-metal style instance powered by the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It features 128 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8369B processor cores running at a clock speed of 2.9 GHz. With a one-to-one mapping of vCPUs to physical cores and 1.0 thread per core, this instance provides dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers between the instance and external storage or other network resources.

Given its high physical core density and dedicated CPU allocation, the ecs.ebmc7.32xlarge offers a highly efficient compute profile for parallel processing tasks. However, the lack of local storage and the relatively low memory-to-core ratio represent key design tradeoffs. This configuration is best suited for compute-heavy workloads such as high-performance computing, batch processing, scientific simulations, and large-scale web serving architectures that rely on external databases.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmc7.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 128 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8369B processor cores running at 2.9 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Operating under the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a dedicated CPU allocation with 1.0 thread per core, eliminating hyperthreading sharing. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing a 2.0 GB per core memory ratio. The instance lacks local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions, but offers a high baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for high-density parallel computing tasks, scientific simulations, and batch processing workloads that demand dedicated CPU execution without the need for massive per-core memory allocations or local storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmc7.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores, 256.0 GB of RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth under a KVM hypervisor.

tagline: A high-density compute instance featuring 128 dedicated physical cores and high-throughput networking for parallel processing workloads.

256.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput connectivity
